name: Lunox
intro: Lunox, the Twilight Goddess, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Dreamland Twist
abilities.description: Buff Lunox is twisted by the powers of Chaos and Order. When Lunox uses Power of Order , she gains 0.5% Spell Vamp for every 1% Magic Penetration . When Lunox uses Power of Chaos , she gains 0.5% Magic Penetration for every 1% of Spell Vamp . Skill terms Spell Vamp Percentage of HP recovered from dealing Skill Damage to an enemy. HP recovered = Skill Damage × Spell Vamp × Spell Vamp Ratio. Usually the Spell Vamp Ratio is 30%–120%, depending on the skill's damage, range and duration. Magic Penetration

abilities.name: Starlight Pulse
abilities.description: AOE Heal | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% Lunox summons a rain of starlight upon nearby enemies, dealing 200–350 (+110% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage . The starlight then returns to Lunox, each restoring and recovering 75–100 (+30% Total Magic Power) HP . The HP restored is doubled when hitting enemy heroes. Grants one stack of Power of Order after use. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Healing Effect The actual ratio of self HP Regen caused to shield values. The default is 100%. Actual Value = Original Value × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × (100% ± Healing Effect Increase/Reduction%) × ...

abilities.name: Chaos Assault
abilities.description: Damage Lunox unleashes Chaos Energy at an enemy, dealing Magic Damage equal to 250–350 (+120% Total Magic Power) (+target's 2.5%–5% Total HP) (1.5%–3% of Max HP against Creeps). Grants one stack of Power of Chaos after use. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Max HP The maximum HP currently can have.

abilities.name: Cosmic Fission
abilities.description: Slow AOE | Spell Vamp Ratio: 50% When Lunox uses the power of Order and Chaos, she will deal 300–500 (+150% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage to the targets along the way and slow them by 40% for 2 seconds. Skill terms Magic Damage Skill Deal Magic DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).
